children.text: We have retrieved your country and language from your device settings, but to deliver you the correct data for your titles, we would like for you to confirm it.
Please let us help you get started
Your collection follows your user account, and an existing collection will synchronize to this device automatically. You can also use the same collection on multiple devices.

Catalog using 'Disc Title' profiles for media on Blu-ray and DVD. Catalog using 'Movie Title' profiles, or 'TV Series' profiles for movies or TV Series on other formats, such as digital downloads. You can always find details about the types in 'Help & Support' under settings.
